description: Enterprise Architecture at Porsche, based on SAFe and PAG modeling standards
LeanIX used for creating and maintaining Digital Solution fact sheets
General fact sheet creation process described in “How to create a fact sheet”
Only required if the Digital Solution is identified via Value Stream Identification during ART ramp-up
Modeling outside the SAFe organization is not allowed
ART Product Team and Enterprise Architect are responsible for guidance
Must follow the naming defined by the owning ART
At least one IT Product must be assigned to each Digital Solution
Responsible ART must be explicitly assigned
Optional: organizational unit (e.g., department) can be linked
May include initiatives, business capabilities, consuming org/process units
Ensures Digital Solutions are only modeled when strategically aligned
Embeds Digital Solutions in SAFe delivery structure
Enables architectural governance and portfolio transparency
Supports consistent evolution of business-enabling technology
